title: Simple Dependency Injection Container
description: Implement a lightweight dependency injection container with support for singleton and prototype scopes, constructor injection, and interface binding.
requirements: Implement register(Class<T> type) for concrete classes
Implement register(Class<T> iface, Class<? extends T> impl) for interface binding
Default to prototype scope (new instance per resolve)

few_shot_examples.prompt: Get constructor parameters and resolve dependencies.
